response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong software craftsmanship, testing practices, and leadership mentoring experience, he falls significantly short on two minimum qualifications: only ~6 months of documented C++ experience versus the required 8 years, and no demonstrated experience with cloud compute platforms or infrastructure-focused roles. His recent career (last 5 years) has been primarily TypeScript/Node.js product development, not systems or cloud infrastructure work.
strengths: Deep commitment to testing practices, TDD, and software quality (created FluentAsserts, Trial libraries; organized testing workshops)
Proven ability to mentor and establish engineering practices across teams (code katas, CI/CD setup, Selenium course, speaking engagements)
15+ years diverse software development experience shipping multiple successful products across different domains
concerns: Critical gap in C++ experience: only ~6 months documented (6 months at National Instruments) versus 8-year minimum requirement
No demonstrated experience leading cloud compute platforms, internal infrastructure projects, or cloud-specific teams; recent roles focused on product development
Career trajectory trends away from systems/infrastructure work into full-stack TypeScript/Node.js product development over the last 5 years
